alerts.paywall_footnote: No credit card · free tier available · 7-day Pro trial
alerts.subtitle: Get notified when something goes wrong with your agents.
alerts.title: Alerts
app.alerts_need_the_cloud_to_deliver_sla:
Alerts need the cloud to deliver Slack / PagerDuty / Telegram / Email
      messages. Sign up — your data stays encrypted, Pro features include a
      7-day free trial.
app.auto_pause_is_a_cloud_pro_feature: Auto-pause is a Cloud Pro feature.
app.coming_soon_mdash_nvidia_nemo_guardr: Coming soon  -  NVIDIA NeMo Guardrails integration is in private preview.
app.could_not_detect_openclaw_version_fr: Could not detect OpenClaw version from config.
app.decompose_one_agent_turn_into_a_wate: Decompose one agent turn into a waterfall: prompt → model call(s) → each tool (start→end) → compaction → reply. Bar width is proportional to wall-clock duration.
app.diagnostics_are_local_only_open_the_: Diagnostics are local-only — open the dashboard on the host to inspect detected config.
app.emergency_stop_disable_all_active_cr: Emergency stop: disable ALL active cron jobs? This cannot be undone automatically.
app.est_equivalent_if_billed_oauth_likel: est. equivalent if billed - OAuth likely
app.every_tool_the_agent_actually_invoke: Every tool the agent actually invoked, grouped by provenance (builtin / MCP / plugin), with call count, p50/p95 latency and error rate. Click a tool to expand its recent calls.
app.failed_to_load_version_impact_data: Failed to load version impact data
app.full_logs_are_not_available_in_cloud: Full logs are not available in cloud view. Use the live stream on the Flow tab.
app.how_full_your_agents_context_windows:
How full your agents’ context windows get, when OpenClaw compacted (proactively vs forced by an overflow),
    how many tokens each compaction reclaimed, and which sessions keep slamming into the wall.
app.i_n_f_r_a_s_t_r_u_c_t_u_r_e: I N F R A S T R U C T U R E
app.memory_access_history_reads_from_the: Memory access history reads from the local event store, which is not available here.
app.memory_files_are_stored_locally_on_t: Memory files are stored locally on the agent machine and are not synced to cloud.
app.no_active_sessions_in_the_last_30_mi: No active sessions in the last 30 min
app.no_anomalies_in_last_48h_baselines_f: No anomalies in last 48h. Baselines from 7-day rolling window.
app.no_background_runs_yet_sub_agent_cro: No background runs yet. Sub-agent, cron and CLI runs from OpenClaw’s task ledger appear here as they execute.
app.no_changes_yet: No changes yet. When your agent updates this, it’ll show up here.
app.no_completed_tasks_yet_today_outcome: No completed tasks yet today. Outcomes will appear once sessions finish.
app.no_context_window_readings_yet_once_: No context-window readings yet. Once your agents take a few turns, per-turn utilization appears here.
app.no_decisions_yet_enable_a_protection: No decisions yet. Enable a protection rule above to get started.
app.no_historical_flow_runs_yet_the_live: No historical flow runs yet. The live Flow view will populate this once a session completes.
app.no_individual_calls_captured_in_the_: No individual calls captured in the recent event window.
app.no_memory_accesses_recorded_yet_they: No memory accesses recorded yet. They appear here once your agent reads its memory.
app.no_model_changes_detected_in_this_se: No model changes detected in this session.
app.no_optimization_suggestions_yet_run_: No optimization suggestions yet — run more agents with span data enabled to see recommendations.
app.no_plugin_tool_call_attribution_dete: No plugin tool-call attribution detected yet.
app.no_provider_cost_data_yet_start_usin: No provider cost data yet — start using models from multiple providers.
app.no_skill_invocations_detected_yet_sk: No skill invocations detected yet. Skills are detected when SKILL.md files are read during sessions.
app.no_sub_agents_found_sub_agents_appea: No sub-agents found. Sub-agents appear here when spawned by the main session.
app.no_token_data_for_the_last_30_days_u: No token data for the last 30 days — usage will appear here once available.
app.no_tool_calls_recorded_for_this_sess: No tool calls recorded for this session.
app.no_tool_calls_recorded_yet_tools_app: No tool calls recorded yet. Tools appear here as the agent invokes them (derived from tool_call → tool_result event pairs).
app.no_tool_policy_recorded_yet_per_agen: No tool policy recorded yet. Per-agent sandbox mode and tool allow/deny lists appear here once the sync daemon reads OpenClaw’s effective policy.
app.no_traces_yet_they_appear_here_once_: No traces yet. They appear here once your agent runs.
app.nothing_installed_yet_skills: Nothing installed yet. Skills let your agent handle specific tasks — add some to get started.
app.nothing_resolved_yet_paste_an_event_: Nothing resolved yet. Paste an event id above to mute a known error.
app.openshell_not_available_on_this_host: openshell not available on this host
app.restart_taking_longer_than_expected_: Restart taking longer than expected. Refresh the page manually.
app.restore_this_version_the_current_con: Restore this version? The current content will be replaced (but saved as a new version in history).
app.reviewing_recent_activity_this_takes: Reviewing recent activity — this takes ~15 seconds…
app.running_pip_install_u_clawmetry_this: Running pip install -U clawmetry. This usually takes 10-30 seconds...
app.saved_new_scores_use_this_rubric_on_: Saved. New scores use this rubric on the next scheduler tick.
app.setting_up_your_node_first_check_in_: Setting up your node. First check-in usually arrives in about 30 seconds.
app.sparkline_available_after_daemon_cap: Sparkline available after daemon captures 24h of samples.
app.tool_calls_grouped_by_mcp_server_vol: Tool calls grouped by MCP server  -  volume, p50/p95 latency, error rate. Model spend is the cost of the turns that called each server.
app.traces_read_from_the_local_event_sto: Traces read from the local event store, which is not available here.
app.turn_anatomy_reads_from_the_local_ev: Turn anatomy reads from the local event store, which is not available here.
app.unable_to_load_diagnostics_right_now: Unable to load diagnostics right now
app.unlock_unlimited_channels_and_multi_: Unlock unlimited channels and multi-recipient delivery.
app.use_your_agent_a_bit: Use your agent a bit and we’ll show how independent it’s becoming.
approvals.bulk_reason_placeholder: Bulk decision reason (optional, applied to all)
approvals.delivered_via: Approvals are delivered via your Notifications channels (Email, Slack, Phone, PagerDuty, Telegram).
approvals.keywords_hint: Enter keywords separated by commas. The agent will be paused when any of these are detected.
approvals.title: Approvals
approvals.trial_note: 7-day free trial · no credit card required
approvals.upgrade_pitch: Cloud-mediated approvals block risky agent actions before they execute. Get notified via Slack, Email, PagerDuty or Telegram, and approve or deny with one click.
banners.no_agent_msg: No OpenClaw or NVIDIA NemoClaw detected. Install one to start seeing data.
boot.loading_all: Loading model, tasks, system health, and live streams…
brain.advisor_hint: ask anything about this agent's activity
brain.advisor_placeholder: e.g. why did my last run cost so much?
brain.focus_tooltip: Focus mode: hide everything except the event stream
brain.plumbing_tooltip: Show internal queue/dequeue events (hidden by default, they're plumbing, not content)
brain.selfevolve_hint: Want a structured review with severity-ranked findings instead?
brain.sugg_cost: Why did my last run cost so much?
brain.sugg_tool: Which tool is failing most often?
brain.title: Brain · Unified Activity Stream
brain.view_toggle_tooltip: Switch between list view and neural-network view
budget.tg_desc_1: Configure direct Telegram notifications for budget alerts. Create a bot via
budget.title: Budget & Alerts
budget.webhook_desc_1: Paste your own Slack or Discord incoming-webhook URL to receive alerts directly. For routed delivery (PagerDuty, email, on-call), see the
cloud.check_email: Check your email for a 6-digit code
cloud.tagline: Monitor your agents from anywhere. Encrypted, real-time, accessible from any browser or as a Mac app.
clusters.title: Session Clusters
context.no_compactions: No compactions yet, context hasn't exceeded the threshold.
context.subtitle: See exactly what context is assembled and sent to the LLM each turn.
context.title: LLM Context Inspector
crons.anomalies_detected: Anomalies detected in cron jobs, review health table below
crons.click_row_expand: Click row to expand run history
crons.prompt_placeholder: What should the agent do when this cron fires?
evaluators.title: Evaluators on your agent
evaluators.subtitle: Named checks ClawMetry runs to tell you if your agent is doing good work. Each one answers a plain question.
history.title: History
inventory.title: Your agents
inventory.story: A calm, one-glance view of every agent on this machine: what it runs, what it costs, and whether it is alive.
inventory.cost_na_tip: This runtime does not report cost yet.
inventory.empty_title: No agents yet, and that is fine.
inventory.empty_body: ClawMetry watches OpenClaw, NVIDIA NemoClaw, and 10 more runtimes the moment they run. Nothing to configure.
memory.access_log_desc: When OpenClaw read its memory (via memory_search / memory_get), and which conversation triggered it. Click a row to open that conversation.
memory.subtitle: Markdown files your agent reads and updates. Edit them too if you want.
memory.title: Memory
nav.alerts_tooltip: Get notified when something goes wrong with your agents
nav.inventory_tooltip: Every agent on this machine: what it runs, what it costs, is it alive, who owns it
nav.live_trace_tooltip: Live view of every running agent
nav.llm_context_tooltip: What the LLM sees on each turn
nav.memory_tooltip: Persistent memory files the agent reads on boot
nav.tracing_tooltip: Every trace: span waterfall, tree, and agent graph
notifications.for_unlimited: for unlimited channels and multi-recipient delivery.
notifications.free_trial_note: Free trial · no credit card required
notifications.noauth_msg: Notifications need a ClawMetry Cloud account to deliver Slack / PagerDuty / Telegram / Email messages.
notifications.subtitle: One place to manage every delivery destination, used by Alerts and Approvals.
notifications.title: Notifications
overview.autonomy_tooltip: How often you need to step in. Higher means more independent.
overview.compare_runs_hint: Paste session ids; green = improvement, red = regression
overview.cost_estimated_note: Estimated from usage, may be $0 billed with OAuth auth
overview.heartbeat_panel_tooltip: Your agent checks in every 30 minutes to prove it's awake. This shows whether it's doing that.
overview.heartbeat_tooltip: Your agent fires a heartbeat session every 30 min. Green means on time, amber means drifting, red means missed.
overview.recent_checkins_tooltip: Each dot is a recent check-in. Green means quiet, amber means took action.
overview.run_health_legend: red = error · yellow = waste · green = clean
overview.triage_hint: Mute known errors so they stop inflating counts
paywall.no_card: No credit card required. Cancel anytime.
security.no_threats: No threats detected · scanning agent activity continuously.
security.audit_empty: No recorded activity yet. Approval decisions, budget changes, and pauses appear here.
security.integrity_checking: Checking the activity log for tampering...
security.title: Security
selfevolve.description: Structured review of recent activity. Each finding has evidence and a concrete action.
selfevolve.subtitle: How your agent could improve.
selfevolve.title: Self-Evolve
skills.select_file: Select a file to view its content
skills.subtitle: Shortcuts your agent can use. Click a skill to browse its files.
skills.title: Skills
topbar.switch_profile: Switch profile (this machine). Local OpenClaw profiles only. For fleet view across multiple machines, upgrade to Pro.
topbar.zoom_level: Current zoom level. Ctrl/Cmd + 0 to reset
tracing.subtitle: Every session as a trace. Open one for the span waterfall, the span tree, and the agent graph.
tracing.title: Tracing
transcripts.plumbing_tooltip: Show Self-Evolve sessions: the agent's own self-review runs (FIX mode + re-analyze), hidden by default because they're plumbing, not your sessions
transcripts.raw_tooltip: Toggle between the beautified turn and the exact JSON payload OpenClaw recorded
usage.cost_comparison_hint: what same workload costs elsewhere · 30 days
usage.otlp_data_source: Data source: OpenTelemetry OTLP - real-time metrics from OpenClaw
usage.top_sessions_hint: which session burned the budget · top 20
version_impact.title: Upgrade Impact
efficiency.label: Efficiency
efficiency.tooltip: A to F score of how much of your spend does useful work: how often your agent reuses what it already read, how much history each reply carries, and whether saved work pays for itself.
efficiency.subtitle: Things you can do to spend less. ClawMetry only suggests; it never changes your agent.
efficiency.grade_sentence: Your agent reuses {hit}% of what it reads and carries about {ctx} tokens of history into each reply.
efficiency.empty_efficient: No savings ideas right now. Your agent is spending efficiently. We keep checking.
efficiency.collecting: Collecting efficiency data. Your grade appears after about a day of activity.
efficiency.idea_model_title: Switch small tasks to a smaller model
efficiency.idea_model_finding: You used {model} for {n} short tasks this month. These look like tasks a smaller model usually handles well.
efficiency.idea_model_how: In your agent settings, set the default model for quick tasks to {target}. ClawMetry cannot change this for you.
efficiency.idea_ctx_finding: Long sessions are carrying old conversation your agent re-reads on every reply.
efficiency.idea_ctx_how: Start a fresh session for new topics. If your agent supports it, /compact shrinks a long session in place.
efficiency.idea_reread_title: Stop paying to re-read old work
efficiency.idea_reread_finding: Starting a new session for a follow-up makes your agent re-read everything. Continuing the same session reuses it for less.
efficiency.idea_reread_how: Reply to follow-ups in the same session soon after, instead of coming back later in a new session.
efficiency.already_saved: Reusing work already saved you about {amt}/mo.
efficiency.paused: Efficiency grade paused: cost numbers on this machine do not agree yet.
